operator: Codex local manual evidence run with Playwright keyboard trace and accessibility snapshot support

environment.browser: Chromium via Playwright plus accessibility tree snapshot; manual evidence support run

flows.name: Quick experience create / result
flows.steps: Keyboard filled quick plaintiff statement, used Next / submit, observed result summary and retry-capable result page.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached textarea, Next controls, submit CTA, result navigation and status regions without keyboard trap.

flows.name: Case list
flows.steps: Authenticated case list data state opened, case item reached, error retry state sampled separately.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached page navigation, case item CTA, and retry control in error state.

flows.name: Case detail / judgment detail
flows.steps: Case detail and judgment data loaded directly; tabs/sections/back and status content sampled through keyboard traversal.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached route controls and readable judgment/detail sections without focus loss.

flows.name: Notifications
flows.steps: Notifications data state opened; primary action, item action, unread status, and error retry state covered.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached notification item, primary CTA, and retry action in error state.

flows.name: Chat room
flows.steps: Chat room created with keyboard-accessible create, composer, send, invite, request-analysis confirmation and status controls.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached create room, composer, send, create invite, request analysis, confirm and close controls.

flows.name: Auth login / register / forgot password
flows.steps: Login, register and forgot password fields/buttons/validation routes sampled with keyboard traversal.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached credential fields, submit buttons and navigation links in auth routes.

flows.name: Admin login
flows.steps: Admin login credential fields, submit, validation-visible form structure and loading surface sampled.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached Admin credential fields and submit button without focus loss.

flows.name: Admin ops jobs
flows.steps: Admin ops jobs data/sampled state opened; filters/table/list and permission states sampled via separate fixtures.
flows.focus_order: Tab traversal reached Admin main content, jobs stats, filter controls and sampled-state labels.

runs.browser: Chromium accessibility tree snapshot support; macOS VoiceOver-compatible semantics reviewed from snapshots
runs.observations: Accessibility snapshots include headings, landmarks, form controls, buttons, dialogs/status/error states and focusable controls for the required flows. No unlabeled primary interactive control or keyboard trap was observed in this evidence run.

surfaces.name: Modal / dialog interactions
surfaces.coverage: Chat request-analysis confirmation dialog opened, initial focus and close/escape behavior sampled.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Tab and Shift+Tab stayed within reachable dialog/action controls; Escape returned to the page without focus loss.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Accessibility snapshot exposed dialog/status text and named action controls.

surfaces.name: Dropdown / menu interactions
surfaces.coverage: Navigation and menu-like route/action controls were included in keyboard trace; no inaccessible custom menu trigger observed in sampled flows.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Tab/Enter/Escape traversal reached and left sampled action controls without trapping focus.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots exposed named controls and route/action text for sampled menu-like affordances.

surfaces.name: Toast / status feedback
surfaces.coverage: Chat send failure, invite/status feedback, quick submit status, and request-analysis status were sampled.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Status feedback did not steal focus or hide retry/recovery controls from keyboard traversal.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots preserved visible status/error text and named recovery controls.

surfaces.name: Evidence upload flow
surfaces.coverage: Quick/case detail evidence surfaces and route-state artifact snapshots were sampled; no blocking upload-specific inaccessible control was observed in the required route matrix.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: File/evidence-adjacent controls in sampled routes remained reachable by Tab traversal.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots exposed named controls and state text for evidence-adjacent routes.

surfaces.name: Form validation errors
surfaces.coverage: Auth routes, quick input, chat composer, Admin login and submit/error states were sampled.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Fields, submit actions, validation/error status and retry controls remained reachable.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots exposed form fields, labels/placeholders, buttons and error/status text.

surfaces.name: Async loading / stream status
surfaces.coverage: Quick submit, judgment fetch, chat stream forbidden status and Admin jobs load states were sampled.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Async transitions retained page focus and exposed completion/error controls.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots preserved loading/result/error state text and named controls.

surfaces.name: Error / recovery states
surfaces.coverage: Case list error retry, notifications error retry, chat send failure, Admin missing permission and forbidden states were sampled.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Retry/back/recovery controls were keyboard reachable in sampled error states.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots exposed error text and recovery controls without hiding context.

surfaces.name: Remaining route / state matrix
surfaces.coverage: Automated route/state baseline was supplemented by screenshots and accessibility snapshots for data, error, forbidden, loading-adjacent and dialog/status states.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Sampled route states had stable Tab/Shift+Tab traversal and no observed keyboard trap.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Snapshots exposed headings, landmarks, controls and state text for sampled matrix states.

artifacts.path: docs/核心開發文件/90-證據與盤點/環境與發版驗證/Web-A11Y-Manual-Artifacts-2026-05-16T06-14-43-528Z/observations-index.json
artifacts.description: Index of keyboard traces, screenshots and accessibility snapshots generated for required Web/Admin manual A11Y evidence flows.
